zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Banastre於1272年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾梅林時，她的父親Jacobus de Banastre35歲，母親Ellen Butler42歲。她和John de Byron至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於大約1314年在英國萊希斯特斯爾韋斯特 蘭頓享年43歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Banastre was born in 1272, in Melling, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Jacobus de Banastre, was 35 and her mother, Ellen Butler, was 42. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with John de Byron. She died about 1314, in West Langton, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 43.

Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec John de Byron. Elle est décédée environ 1314, à West Langton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Banastre(이)가 1272년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 멜링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jacobus de Banastre(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen Butler(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 John de Byron(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1314년 영국 레이스스터실르 웨스트 랭턴에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Banastre родилась в 1272 г. в местности меллинг, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Jacobus de Banastre было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Butler, 42.
